  "findings": [
    "Severe, irregular electrical arcing sound detected from within the panel",
    "Loose termination or splice causing intermittent contact under load",
    "Extreme fire and shock hazard present"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately isolate power to the panel at the upstream disconnect",
    "Lock out and tag out (LOTO) the source",
    "Open the panel cover to inspect for thermal damage, pitting, or oxidation",
    "Re-terminate or replace damaged conductors and torque to manufacturer specifications"
  ],
  "rationale": "The audio recording reveals distinct, irregular crackling and spitting sounds characteristic of high-energy electrical arcing rather than a steady electromagnetic hum. This indicates a severely loose connection or failing splice that poses an immediate fire and safety hazard, requiring urgent isolation and repair.",

    "NEC 110.14",
    "NFPA 70E"
  ]
}
